titleStmt.title: Fragments of missals and prayer books

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

extent.note: It is not clear from the catalogue description, whether the given dimensions refer to outer or inner dimensions.

supportDesc.collation: Loose leaves and unbound quires, some of which are held together by intertwined strings. Several pages are loose and have clearly been moved. An unknown number of leaves are undoubtedly missing from various places.
supportDesc.condition: Most of the pages have been seriously damaged by rodents, with part of the text often being missing. The back board is missing.

item.desc: A note by on the inner side of the front board concerning the provenance of the manuscript from a church in ‘Arbambà’ in , possibly corresponding to .
Ex libris of on the inner side of the front board.

binding.decoNote: Wooden boards, of which only the front board remains, curiously fastened with a string threaded through a hole.

history.provenance: The manuscript was acquired by from a church in ‘Arbambà’ in as it is noted on the inner side of the front board (cf. ), which is probably to be identified with . acquired the manuscript probably during his stay in Eritrea (1899–1903) or it was sent to him after his return to Europe.

msItem.title: End of the Anaphora of the Apostles
Fragments of Śǝrʿāta qǝddāse (Mastabqʷǝʿ)
msItem.note: It is not clear, where the text starts.

msItem.title: Prayers over the utensils of the church
Beginning of the Anaphora of Dioscorus

supportDesc.collation: Many leaves are misplaced or missing. seems to be the last folio of the original manuscript.

msItem.note: Possibly written by the same hand as .
msItem.incipit: በመስከረም፡ በግንቦት፡ ፱ ጫማ፡ በጥቅምት፡ በሚያዝያ፡ ፲ ጫማ፡ በሰኔ፡ ሐምሌ፡ ነሐሴ፡ ፰ ጫማ፡
እግዚአብሔር፡ አምላክነ፡ ነጽር፡ ዲበ፡ እለ፡ ውስተ፡ ንስሓ፡ ሀለዉ፡

notatedMusic.desc: It is not clear from the catalogue description in 58, 2162, whether this part also contains musical notation.

msItem.title: End of the Anaphora of Cyril
Beginning of the Anaphora of John Chrysostom

notatedMusic.desc: It is not clear from the catalogue description in 58, 2162, whether this part also contains musical notation.

msItem.title: Beginning of the Anaphora of the Apostles
Anaphora of John the Evangelist
msItem.note: Written by another hand. The end is missing. The fragment was possibly taken from another manuscript.

item.desc: A personal name, possibly the name of an owner: Gabra Māryām .

notatedMusic.desc: Musical notation in black and red.

msItem.note: Spaces for rubrications are left blank.

revisionDesc.change: Updated after reviews by Elizaveta Shvarts and Magdalena Krzyżanowska
